member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.AS4
member.summary: Task class for AS4 Receive operations.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Receive.AS4.Receive(Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input,Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes an inbound AS4 message received via a Frends HTTP trigger. Parses the Multipart/Related SOAP-with-Attachments body, extracts the eb:Messaging routing headers, optionally verifies the WS-Security RSA-SHA256 signature, decrypts the payload attachment using the receiver's private certificate, and decompresses it if GZip or Deflate compression is detected. [Documentation](https://tasks.frends.com/tasks/CHANNEL/Frends.AS4.Receive)
member.param: The raw HTTP request body and Content-Type header from the Frends HTTP trigger, plus certificate paths for decryption and signature verification.
Behavioural flags: VerifySignature, DecryptPayload, DecompressPayload, and ThrowErrorOnFailure.
A cancellation token provided by the Frends Platform.
member.returns: object { bool Success, string PayloadString, byte[] PayloadBytes, string MessageId, string SenderPartyId, string RecipientPartyId, string Service, string Action, string ConversationId, string AgreementRef, bool SignatureVerified, object Error { string Message, Exception AdditionalInfo } }

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Error
member.summary: Error information returned when the AS4 Receive task encounters a failure.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Error.Message
member.summary: Human-readable summary of the error.
member.example: Signature verification failed: digest mismatch on eb:Messaging.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Error.AdditionalInfo
member.summary: The underlying exception providing stack trace and inner exception details.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input
member.summary: Input parameters for the AS4 Receive task.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input.RequestBody
member.summary: The raw HTTP request body received from the Frends HTTP trigger. This is the full Multipart/Related MIME body containing the SOAP envelope and any payload attachments.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input.ContentTypeHeader
member.summary: The value of the Content-Type HTTP request header, including the multipart boundary. Typically sourced from the Frends HTTP trigger's header collection.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input.ReceiverCertificatePath
member.summary: File system path to the receiver's PFX (PKCS#12) certificate used to decrypt the inbound payload. Must contain the private key.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input.ReceiverCertificatePassword
member.summary: Password protecting the receiver PFX certificate file.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Input.SenderCertificatePath
member.summary: Optional file system path to the sender's public X.509 certificate (.cer/.crt) used to verify the WS-Security signature on the inbound message. When left empty and VerifySignature is true, the certificate embedded in the SOAP wsse:BinarySecurityToken is trusted directly (no external trust anchor check).

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options
member.summary: Additional options controlling the AS4 Receive task behaviour.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options.VerifySignature
member.summary: When true, the WS-Security digital signature on the inbound message is verified using RSA-SHA256. The signature covers the eb:Messaging header and the payload attachment. An exception is thrown if verification fails.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options.DecryptPayload
member.summary: When true, the task attempts to decrypt the payload attachment using the receiver certificate. The AES-256 session key is unwrapped from the xenc:EncryptedKey element in the WS-Security header using RSA-OAEP.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options.DecompressPayload
member.summary: When true, the task decompresses the payload if GZip or Deflate compression is detected (either via eb:PartProperties or by inspecting the magic bytes).

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options.ThrowErrorOnFailure
member.summary: When true, any exception during task execution is re-thrown and propagates to the Frends process. When false, the exception is captured in Result.Error and Result.Success is set to false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Options.ErrorMessageOnFailure
member.summary: Overrides the error message returned or thrown on failure. When empty, the original exception message is used.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result
member.summary: Result returned by the AS4 Receive task after parsing and processing an inbound message.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.Success
member.summary: Indicates whether the task completed successfully, including MIME parsing, optional signature verification, decryption, and decompression.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.PayloadString
member.summary: The processed payload decoded as a UTF-8 string. Null when the message contains no payload attachment or when Success is false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.PayloadBytes
member.summary: The raw bytes of the processed payload after any decryption and decompression. Null when the message contains no payload attachment or when Success is false.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.MessageId
member.summary: The AS4 MessageId extracted from the eb:MessageInfo header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.SenderPartyId
member.summary: The sender's AS4 party identifier extracted from the eb:From/eb:PartyId header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.RecipientPartyId
member.summary: The recipient's AS4 party identifier extracted from the eb:To/eb:PartyId header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.Service
member.summary: The AS4 Service value extracted from the eb:CollaborationInfo header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.Action
member.summary: The AS4 Action value extracted from the eb:CollaborationInfo header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.ConversationId
member.summary: The conversation identifier extracted from the eb:CollaborationInfo header.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.AgreementRef
member.summary: The P-Mode agreement reference extracted from the eb:CollaborationInfo header. Null when AgreementRef was not present in the inbound message.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.SignatureVerified
member.summary: Indicates whether the WS-Security digital signature was present and verified successfully. False when VerifySignature option was disabled.

member.name: P:Frends.AS4.Receive.Definitions.Result.Error
member.summary: Error information populated when Success is false. Null on successful completion.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Helpers.As4MessageParser
member.summary: Parses an inbound AS4 Multipart/Related HTTP request body into its constituent SOAP envelope and payload attachment, with optional decryption and decompression.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Receive.Helpers.As4MessageParser.Parse(System.String,System.String,System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Parses the raw request body, extracts the SOAP envelope and attachment, and applies optional decryption and decompression.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Helpers.ParsedAs4Message
member.summary: Holds the parsed components of an inbound AS4 message.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Helpers.As4RoutingMetadata
member.summary: Routing metadata extracted from the eb:Messaging SOAP header.

member.name: T:Frends.AS4.Receive.Helpers.As4SignatureVerifier
member.summary: Verifies the WS-Security XML Digital Signature on an inbound AS4 message. Checks the RSA-SHA256 signature over the eb:Messaging element and the payload attachment digest.

member.name: M:Frends.AS4.Receive.Helpers.As4SignatureVerifier.Verify(System.Xml.XmlDocument,System.Byte[],System.Security.Cryptography.X509Certificates.X509Certificate2)
member.summary: Verifies the ds:Signature in the wsse:Security header of .
member.param: Raw (post-decryption) attachment bytes used for digest verification.

Optional trusted sender certificate. When null the certificate is taken from the wsse:BinarySecurityToken in the message itself (the signature is still mathematically verified but the trust anchor is not checked against an external store).
member.exception: Thrown when no Signature element is found.
Thrown when the signature or a digest is invalid.
